CVE-2024-5629.title: An out-of-bounds read in the 'bson' module of PyMongo 4.6.2 or ea ...
CVE-2024-5629.summary: An out-of-bounds read in the 'bson' module of PyMongo 4.6.2 or earlier allows deserialization of malformed BSON provided by a Server to raise an exception which may contain arbitrary application memory.
